_comment: Expected output for verify-external.sh. Update on first verified run; PENDING_FIRST_VERIFICATION values are placeholders.
_notes: Debian-built wget. F5 must detect glibc via DT_NEEDED libc.so.6. F1 must apply glibc fortify suppression: where __sprintf_chk / __strcpy_chk are present AND the bare sprintf/strcpy import is absent in PLT, those entries should NOT be flagged. If the bare imports remain, they MUST still be flagged (per spec line 84).
